name: agentchange
description: Creates per-turn evidence-backed Codex change receipts.

interface.longDescription: Records supported lifecycle evidence, compares same-turn validation with Codex claims, inspects local Git state, and creates per-turn JSON and Markdown receipts with optional Slack delivery.
defaultPrompt: Use AgentChange while implementing and validating this coding task.
Record supported Codex lifecycle evidence for this repository change.
